scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run build:framework && npm run build:app && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp -r public/* dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let h=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8'); h=h.replace(/<script type='module' id='dev-fw'>[\\s\\S]*?<\/script>/, '<script src=\"native-canvas.js\"></script>'); h=h.replace(/<script type=\"module\" src=\"\/example\/main.ts\" id=\"dev-app\"><\/script>/, '<script src=\"main.js\"></script>'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h);"
